name: Graphos Modular Refactoring
objective: Split 6 coupling hotspot modules identified by graph analysis into focused sub-modules, reducing degree and improving cohesion while maintaining backward compatibility.
exit_criteria: All 6 hotspot modules split into focused sub-modules
Each new sub-module has explicit exports (< 100 lines ideally)
Original modules serve as re-export hubs where applicable
Clean architecture boundaries respected (no IO in Domain/UseCase)
cabal build succeeds after each subtask
cabal test passes after each subtask
Graph degree for former hotspot modules significantly reduced
